name: ticlaw-workspace
description: TiClaw — Local-first AI Agent Node + Gateway

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ticlaw/gateway run build && pnpm --filter @ticlaw/edge run build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @ticlaw/gateway run build && concurrently -n gateway,node -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @ticlaw/gateway run dev" "sleep 1 && pnpm --filter @ticlaw/edge run dev"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n gateway,node,web -c cyan,green,blue "pnpm --filter @ticlaw/gateway run dev" "sleep 1 && pnpm --filter @ticlaw/edge run dev" "pnpm --filter web run dev"
